entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: Country where the land management practices and soil loss studies were reviewed

entities.name: LAND MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Practices implemented to enhance sediment management and crop productivity

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The amount of soil removed from the land surface by erosion

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural yield from the land

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION NEUTRALITY
entities.description: A state where the amount and quality of land resources necessary to support ecosystem functions are maintained

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of the environmental quality of land

entities.name: AREA CLOSURE
entities.description: A land management practice involving the restriction of access to land to allow natural regeneration

entities.name: PERENNIAL VEGETATION COVER
entities.description: The use of long-lived plants to cover the soil surface

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural techniques used to improve crop yield and soil health

entities.name: MECHANICAL EROSION CONTROL PRACTICES
entities.description: Physical structures or interventions used to prevent soil erosion

entities.name: ANNUAL CROPLAND COVER
entities.description: The practice of maintaining crop cover on a yearly basis

entities.name: DRAINAGE PRACTICES
entities.description: Methods used to manage excess water on land

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period of the year characterized by higher rainfall

entities.name: SOIL COVER
entities.description: The presence of organic or inorganic material covering the soil surface

entities.name: MOISTURE RETENTION
entities.description: The ability of the soil to hold water

entities.name: SEDIMENT TRANSPORT BARRIERS
entities.description: Physical barriers designed to stop or slow the movement of sediment
